title: Linear — Issue tracking that works for high-output teams
description: T660 / T73 cycle 2: linear.app landing page rebuilt as a Forge CmsPage. Second public-site rebuild — tests the gap-list dedup theory.

sections.title: Built for the world's fastest teams
sections.lede: Meet the new standard for modern software development. Streamline issues, projects, and product roadmaps in one beautifully crafted app.

sections.title: GAP-T660-1 (re-surfaced) — Pricing tier-card variant
body: Same gap as the Stripe pricing rebuild: Linear has a 3-tier pricing teaser (Free / Standard / Plus) on this page. With no Pricing CmsSection, the rebuild collapses to prose. This is the SECOND independent site that needed the same variant — the dedup theory holds; the Pricing primitive earns priority in the T70 backlog.

items.value: Cycle planning, project management, roadmap views, native Git integration.
Break down work, link blockers, surface dependencies across teams.
Quarterly and annual planning views with rollups across initiatives.
Pre-built dashboards: velocity, throughput, lead time, customer-facing metrics.
GitHub, GitLab, Slack, Figma, Sentry, Front, Zendesk, plus 60+ via webhooks.
Customer-facing intake form that lands directly in your triage queue.

sections.text: Trusted by the best in the business

sections.title: GAP-T660-4 (re-surfaced) — LogoWall section variant
body: Linear's homepage has a wall of customer logos: Vercel, Ramp, Loom, Mercury, Brex, Retool, Cash App, Raycast, Arc, Replicate, Perplexity, Cursor, OpenAI, Anthropic. With no LogoWall variant + no loom-brand-icons crate, the rebuild names the customers in prose. SAME gap as marcodeluca.me GAP-T662-4 and Stripe GAP-T660-5 — three independent surfaces. Priority bump confirmed.

items.title: Cycles — sprint-style planning that just works
Projects — ship initiatives end-to-end
items.host_sub: Multi-week scope with rollups + status updates

items.title: Roadmaps — strategy + execution in one view
Insights — metrics your team trusts
items.host_sub: Velocity, throughput, lead time, customer NPS

sections.title: GAP-T660-NEW — Testimonial / quote-row variant
body: Linear's homepage rotates 5-7 customer quotes (Vercel CEO, Ramp engineering, etc.) with the speaker's name + role + headshot in a card carousel. Forge has no Quote section variant. Stripe's homepage has the same shape. Adding it earns a T70 sub-task — likely earlier in the backlog than the others because two surfaces in two rebuilds.
Proposed shape: Quote { body: String, attribution: QuoteAttribution { name, role, avatar }, carousel_neighbors: Vec<QuoteAttribution> }.

sections.title: Free
body: Up to 250 issues. Unlimited members. Slack + GitHub integrations. Free forever.

sections.title: Standard — $8/user/month
body: Everything in Free, plus: cycles, projects, milestones, custom views, API access, 30k issues, admin roles, audit log.

sections.title: Plus — $14/user/month
body: Everything in Standard, plus: SAML SSO, advanced security controls, custom workflows, priority support, dedicated success manager.

sections.text: Phase-1 rebuild only — pricing tiers collapse to Group blocks until the Pricing variant lands. Quote-section gap newly catalogued. LogoWall gap now confirmed across three sites — priority bump.
